title: Edu EPUB Creator: A local-first authoring tool for interactive educational EPUB 3
description: A local-first, browser-based authoring tool for building interactive, accessible educational EPUB 3 books with a visual editor, reusable learning blocks, multimedia and 3D/HTML import, structured EPUB 3 export, a sandboxed preview and a deny-by-default content security policy for imported content. Formal conformance validation should be performed separately with EPUBCheck.
